contact.title: Contactez-nous
contact.subtitle: Nous aimerions avoir de vos nouvelles

getInTouch.heading: Entrer en contact
getInTouch.body: Des questions, des idées ou des commentaires ? Contactez directement l'équipe éditoriale par e-mail et nous vous répondrons dès que possible.

contribute.heading: Vous souhaitez contribuer ?
contribute.body: Si vous souhaitez partager une histoire ou rejoindre le magazine, rendez-vous sur notre page <link>Contribuer</link>.

s1.heading: 1. Introduction
s1.body: We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and share information when you use our website [yourdomain.com].

s2.heading: 2. Information We Collect
s2.intro: We may collect the following types of information:
s2.item1: Personal Information: Name, email, or other details you voluntarily submit (e.g., contact forms or newsletter subscriptions).
s2.item2: Usage Data: IP address, browser type, device, pages visited, and time spent — collected via cookies and analytics tools.
s2.item3: Uploaded Content: Any content (articles, comments, media) you submit or contribute.

s3.heading: 3. How We Use Your Information
s3.item2: Improve user experience and content relevance
s3.item3: Respond to inquiries or support requests
s3.item4: Send occasional updates (only with your consent)

s4.heading: 4. Sharing and Disclosure
s4.intro: We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties, except:
s4.item1: With service providers (e.g., hosting, analytics) under confidentiality agreements
s4.item2: If required by law or legal process
s4.item3: To prevent fraud or protect the security of our services

s5.heading: 5. Cookies and Analytics
s5.body: We use cookies and similar technologies to collect usage data and improve our services. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings. We may use analytics services (e.g., Google Analytics) to understand how visitors use our site and to optimize content and performance.

s1.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.body: By accessing or using [yourdomain.com], you agree to these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the website.

s2.heading: 2. Use of the Website
s2.item1: Use the site only for lawful, non-commercial purposes
s2.item3: Not interfere with or disrupt the site or servers

s3.heading: 3. User Content
s3.intro: If you upload or contribute content:
s3.item1: You retain ownership, but grant us a license to display, share, and archive your content on our platform
s3.item2: You must not upload content that is unlawful, defamatory, infringing, or harmful
s3.after: We reserve the right to remove any content at our discretion.

s4.heading: 4. Intellectual Property
s4.body: All content on this website — including text, design, logos, videos, and other media — is either owned by or licensed to us and protected by copyright and intellectual property laws.

s5.heading: 5. Links to Other Websites
s5.body: Our site may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for their content, policies, or practices.

s6.heading: 6. Disclaimers
s6.body: The content provided is for educational and informational purposes. While we strive for accuracy, we make no warranties about the completeness, reliability, or accuracy of any content.

s7.heading: 7. Limitation of Liability
s7.body: We are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of this website.

s8.heading: 8. Modifications
s8.body: We may update these Terms of Service at any time. Continued use of the site means you accept the revised terms.

s9.heading: 9. Governing Law
s9.body: These terms are governed by the laws of [Your Country/State]. Any disputes shall be resolved under the jurisdiction of [Your Jurisdiction].

s10.heading: 10. Contact Us
s10.address: 📍 Address: [Your Organization, Street Address, City, Country]
